core_mechanism: a geometry-of-interaction / trace construction that reduces the composition of interacting components to path composition in a directed network, resolving feedback loops by summing over all directed paths of partial functions (an execution formula on the category of sets and partial functions)
brief_reason: The abstract states that composition of proof nets is simply path composition and that all of the dynamics happens in GoI(Setp), the geometry-of-interaction construction applied to sets and partial functions, so the transferable machinery is path/feedback resolution over partial functions rather than the logic subject matter.
